text.text: You are now a part of CompStak. *Welcome!* We really do hope that you are going to like it here. You've been assigned to team Vega

There is a lot for you to learn about how things work. For starters, join the <https://compstak.slack.com/archives/C024FCM07|General> and the <https://compstak.slack.com/archives/C024FCM09|Random> channels. You will be invited to the team-specific channels later.
Now, let's collect some condensed information about your precious person. Please, keep it short and indicate only the most relevant:

label.text: Tell us about your edication and work experience

elements.text: *Graduated* from Harvard in 1987. *Worked* as janitor for 20 years. *Learned* Scala in 2009, and have been working as engineer since 2010.

text.text: Now, please provide three statements about yourself (in general, not just the work stuff), two of which will be true, and the third — a lie.

elements.text: This is for a game we sometimes play. Order is up to you
